productDisplayName: Catwalk Women Slim Casual Beige Wedges
description: Get dressed in these denim wedges from catwalk for that uber cool, chic, tall and slim look. The denim finish adds a dash of glamour to your appeal, making this pair a must have in your wardrobe.UpperSynthetic leather upper in horizontal pattern across the forefootCriss cross straps in synthetic leather around the anklesHeel cup with a zipper for ease of wearMidsoleSoft footbed for great comfortFootbed stitched to the outsole for durability and styleOutsoleTPU outsole in wooden finish with wedge heel for lightweight comfort and to offer a tall, slim lookshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth or brush, using cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
